imaging_request.indication_text: Surveillance CT chest 6 months post-lobectomy for biopsy-proven stage IIB NSCLC, right lower lobe. Patient on adjuvant carboplatin/pemetrexed completed February 2026.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of lower lobe, right bronchus
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT3N1M0, Stage IIB confirmed post-resection. Adjuvant chemotherapy 4 cycles completed. Oncologist requests routine 6-month surveillance per NCCN guidelines.
